steps.title: Fit f from the table
steps.content: Use the table points for $f$: $(-4,0)$ and $\left(-\frac{19}{5},1\right)$. Enter them as lists and run $y_1 \sim m x_1+b$. Desmos gives $m=5$ and $b=20$, so $f(x)=5x+20$.

steps.title: Apply h(x) = f(x) - 13
steps.content: Now subtract $13$ from the whole function: $$h(x)=f(x)-13=(5x+20)-13=5x+7$$ That matches choice B.
